description: This pipeline appears to be designed for image processing and enhancement, specifically tailored for biomedical microscopic images. It begins by accepting input data, which is then split and filtered based on annotations. The processed data is subsequently enhanced through contrast adjustment and histogram normalization. Additionally, the pipeline applies an extended depth of focus projection to maximize intensity in local areas of the image. The output from these processes is further refined through color mapping and lut adjustments, ultimately producing an enhanced image with improved visibility and detail.

8e0fdf48-e4a9-4989-9c38-8bb0b03f4a6f.name: ij1-set-lut-from-color-map
8e0fdf48-e4a9-4989-9c38-8bb0b03f4a6f.description: Sets the LUT of the image from a predefined color map. This does not change the pixel data.

b5115aea-b37c-46bf-b613-f627f81c56de.name: ij1-contrast-histogram-enhancer
b5115aea-b37c-46bf-b613-f627f81c56de.description: Implementation of the ImageJ contrast enhancer feature that uses histograms and normalization methods.

a6b69345-973e-4c34-bef6-9a6cf89c2016.name: annotate-split-by-annotation
a6b69345-973e-4c34-bef6-9a6cf89c2016.description: Splits the input data by a specified annotation or filters data based on the annotation value.

dde194a3-96af-46fd-b70f-5e0788555173.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExtendedDepthOfFocusSobelProjection
dde194a3-96af-46fd-b70f-5e0788555173.description:
Extended depth of focus projection maximizing intensity in the local sobel image.

The sigma parameter allows controlling an Gaussian blur which should smooth the altitude map.

Parameters: Image source, ByRef Image destination, Number sigma
Available for: 3D -> 2D
